title: My Husband's Brother Took His $250K Insurance. So I Sued, Got It Back, Watched Him Go Bankrupt.
description: My brother-in-law manipulated my terminally ill husband into making him the beneficiary of a $250K life insurance policy, leaving me broke. I took him to court, won back every cent plus legal fees, and used the money to open a rival auto repair shop that put his garage out of business within two years. #RevengeStory #FamilyBetrayal #Karma
thumb_text: HE STOLE MY HUSBANDS INSURANCE I WATCHED HIM GO BANKRUPT

thumb_lines.text: HE LAUGHED AND SAID I WOULD JUST REMARRY
I SUED AND WON IT ALL
